configurations.name: dbt: Seed + Run
configurations.command: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose run --rm dbt "dbt seed --full-refresh && dbt run"

configurations.name: dbt: Test
configurations.command: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose run --rm dbt "dbt test"

configurations.name: dbt: Full Demo (deps + seed + run + test)
configurations.command: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose run --rm dbt "dbt deps && dbt seed --full-refresh && dbt run && dbt test"
